phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for guided visits
phrases.text_local: Onde faço o pagamento das visitas guiadas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FAH-soo AW puh-guh-MAYNG-too DUHSH vee-ZEE-tuhsh GEEAH-duhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tour payments are consolidated at the ticket counter to reduce queue times.

likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the main ticket office.

responses.english: You can pay at the main ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso obter um mapa de ciclovias?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo awb-TEHR OONNG MAH-puh DIH seek-loo-VEEUHSH?

likely_response.local: No Balcão de Atendimento Principal, os nossos atendentes podem fornecer-lhe o Mapa de Ciclovias do Estoril.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too preen-see-PAHL, OOSH NAW-soosh uh-tayng-DAYNG-tihsh PAW-dayng foo-ruh-nih-SEHR-LYIH AW MAH-puh DIH seek-loo-VEEUHSH DOO shtoo-REEL.
likely_response.translation_en: At the Main Service Counter, our attendants can provide you with the Estoril Cycling Map.

responses.english: At the Main Service Counter, our attendants can provide you with the Estoril Cycling Map.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too preen-see-PAHL, OOSH NAW-soosh uh-tayng-DAYNG-tihsh PAW-dayng foo-ruh-nih-SEHR-LYIH AW MAH-puh DIH seek-loo-VEEUHSH DOO shtoo-REEL.
responses.french: No Balcão de Atendimento Principal, os nossos atendentes podem fornecer-lhe o Mapa de Ciclovias do Estoril.

phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde fica o painel de horários de comboio?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW peye-NEHL DIH oo-RAH-reeoosh DIH koom-BOYOO?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Painel de Horários de Comboio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW peye-NEHL DIH oo-RAH-reeoosh DIH koom-BOYOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Please, where is the train schedule panel? Follow the signs to the Train Schedule Panel.

responses.english: Please, where is the train schedule panel? Follow the signs to the Train Schedule Panel.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW peye-NEHL DIH oo-RAH-reeoosh DIH koom-BOYOO.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Painel de Horários de Comboio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for guided visits
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tour payments are typically handled at the main service counter of the tourist office.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, é no balcão principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, EH NOO bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's at the main counter.

responses.english: Good morning, it's at the main counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, EH NOO bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, é no balcão principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Estoril cycle path map is
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde está o mapa de ciclovias do Estoril?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW MAH-puh DIH seek-loo-VEEUHSH DOO shtoo-REEL?
phrases.cultural_note: Pointing to the rack is common; staff may gesture.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the municipal events calendar is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o calendário de eventos municipais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW kuh-layng-DAHR-yoo DIH eh-VAYNG-toosh moo-nee-see-PEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Municipal schedules are typically mounted on designated walls for high visibility.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está no Balcão de Atendimento Principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is at the main service counter.

responses.english: Good morning, it is at the main service counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, está no Balcão de Atendimento Principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Estoril cycle path map is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o mapa das ciclovias do Estoril?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW MAH-puh DUHSH seek-loo-VEEUHSH DOO shtoo-REEL?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese tourist offices centralize maps in dedicated racks near the service area for quick access.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no rack de brochuras regionais.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO RAHK DIH broo-SHOO-ruhsh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the regional brochures rack.

responses.english: Good morning, at the regional brochures rack.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO RAHK DIH broo-SHOO-ruhsh reh-zheeoo-NEYESH.
responses.french: Bom dia, no rack de brochuras regionais.

phrases.cultural_note: Bicycle rental is handled at the main counter, not a separate desk.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy parking passes
phrases.text_local: Onde posso adquirir passes de estacionamento no local?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uhd-kee-REER PAH-sihsh DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too NOO loo-KAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking permits are issued directly at the primary counter to streamline visitor processing.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão de atendimento principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the main service counter.

responses.english: Good morning, at the main service counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, no balcão de atendimento principal.
